user.title: cTrader App Credentials
user.description:
Before starting, register your app at https://openapi.ctrader.com and get Spotware approval.

Enter your app credentials (from the credentials section):

auth_code.title: Authorize Account

error.invalid_auth:
Authorization failed. Check:
- Authorization code is correct
- Code hasn't expired (valid for ~1 minute)
- Client ID and secret are correct

abort.already_configured: This cTrader account is already configured
